ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO currency code */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* Parent industry ID (for sub-industries) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Industry ID (foreign key to industries table) */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Sector ID (foreign key to sectors table) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  " cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  "lei" TEXT /* Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Company address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Company country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Company ID (foreign key to companies table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Company ID (foreign key to companies table) */,
  "simfin_id" INTEGER /* SimFin ID for the company */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Currency ID (foreign key to currencies table) */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year for the financial statement */,
  "fiscal_period" TEXT /* Fiscal period for the financial statement */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the financial statement was reported */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the financial statement was published */,
  "restated_date" TEXT /* Date the financial statement was restated */,
  "shares_basic" REAL /* Number of basic shares outstanding */,
  "shares_diluted" REAL /* Number of diluted shares outstanding */,
  "non_operating_income_loss" REAL /* Non-operating income or loss */,
  "interest_expense_net" REAL /* Net interest expense */,
  "pretax_income_loss_adj" REAL /* Adjusted pretax income or loss */,
  "abnormal_gains_losses" REAL /* Abnormal gains or losses */,
  "pretax_income_loss" REAL /* Pretax income or loss */,
  "income_tax_expense_benefit_net" REAL /* Net income tax expense or benefit */,
  "income_loss_continuing_operations" REAL /* Income or loss from continuing operations */,
  "net_extraordinary_gains_losses" REAL /* Net extraordinary gains or losses */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income */,
  "net_income_common" REAL /* Net income available to common shareholders */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue */,
  "cost_of_revenue" REAL /* Cost of revenue */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit */,
  "operating_expenses" REAL /* Operating expenses */,
  "operating_income_loss" REAL /* Operating income or loss */,
  "total_other_income_expenses_net" REAL /* Total other income or expenses, net */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statement_line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Financial statement ID (foreign key to financial_statements table) */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., asset, liability, equity, revenue, expense) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statement_line_items_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Financial statement ID (foreign key to financial_statements table) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID (foreign key to users table) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID (foreign key to users table) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., income statement, balance sheet, cash flow statement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Report ID (foreign key to reports table) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID (foreign key to users table) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Report ID (foreign key to reports table) */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., chart, table, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_components_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_component_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Component ID (foreign key to report_components table) */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the data point */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_component_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES report_components ("component_id")
)
